title: Select * on grouped view: wrong error "cannot use non GROUP BY column 'a1' in query results without an aggregate function"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (a1 INT, a2 VARCHAR(50), a3 FLOAT, a4 DATE);
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT a1, a2 FROM test_table GROUP BY a1, a2;
SELECT a1, a3 FROM test_table WHERE a1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Selecting all columns from a grouped view
